children.text:
All symbols pay from left to right on adjacent reels starting from the leftmost reel.
The win table shows all win combinations and their value according to chosen bet and on the winlines below.

All line pay symbols must appear on a played line and on consecutive reels, beginning with the far left reel.
Only the highest line win is paid on each line played.
Line wins are multiplied by the number of credits bet on the winning line.

SEVEN symbol is WILD and
substitutes for all symbols except
the SCATTER STAR Symbol.
WILD appears on all reels.

Scatter wins are awarded for symbols
appearing in any position on the reels for
any number of played lines.
Only the highest scatter win is paid each
game.
Scattered wins are added to pay line wins.

MALFUNCTION VOIDS ALL PAYS AND PLAYS.
Theoretical RTP of the game is minimum 92%
High volatility games pay out less often but the chance to hit big wins in a short time span is higher.
Settings button [img:small-icon-menu.png] opens settings menu that contain settings which affects the way the game is being played per each login.
In game settings menu adjust number of lines and bet per line that you want to use in the game.
CREDIT and BET labels show the current balance and current total bet
Left button [img:small-icon-left.png] and Right button [img:small-icon-right.png] scroll between information pages
Close button [img:small-icon-close.png] closes the information screen
Space on the keyboard can be used to start or stop spin.
Click and hold the Start button [img:small-icon-spin.png] in game until start Autoplay function [img:small-icon-autoplay.png] start.

STOP AUTOPLAY

AFTER ANY WIN - just press Start and Autoplay function will stop.
IF FEATURE IS WON - whenever a feature like bonus or free spin is won, Autoplay will stop.
IF SINGLE WIN EXCEEDS - whenewer a single win is above the sum written in this field, Autoplay will stop.
IF CREDIT INCREASES BY - whenever your current balance is above the sum written in this field, Autoplay will stop.
IF CREDIT DECREASES BY - whenever your current balance is below the sum written in this field, Autoplay will stop.

GAMEBLE UP TO 5x
GAMBLE MAX LIMIT 1000
